justification_summary: Patient presents with rheumatoid arthritis (M06.9). Failed methotrexate (hepatotoxicity), sulfasalazine (GI intolerance), and conservative therapies. RF positive (128 IU/mL), Anti-CCP positive (>250 U/mL), ESR elevated (42), CRP elevated (3.2). Erosive changes on imaging. Humira is medically necessary as next step per ACR guidelines.
